intro.heading: Let's Build Something Together
intro.body: I help small businesses and independent professionals get online quickly with sites that look professional from day one. No bloated agencies, no unnecessary complexity — just clean design, solid code, and a site you're proud to share.

services.title: Custom Website Design
services.description: Your first impression matters. I design minimal, professional layouts that reflect your brand and turn visitors into enquiries.

services.title: Responsive & Accessible
services.description: Your site works perfectly on any device — from desktop to phone. No pinching, no broken layouts, no excuses.

services.title: Lead Capture & Forms
services.description: Contact forms, newsletter sign-ups, and booking flows that connect you directly to people who want what you offer.

services.title: E-Commerce & Payments
services.description: Sell products or services online without the complexity. Stripe, PayPal, or Shopify — I handle the integration.

services.title: Content Management
services.description: Update your own site without touching a line of code. I'll set up a CMS so your content stays fresh.

services.title: Analytics Ready
services.description: Know who's visiting, what they're looking at, and where they drop off — so you can make smarter decisions.

portfolio.title: Brew & Bloom Coffee
portfolio.description: A mobile-friendly, scroll-based landing page for a local coffee brand — warm tones, clean menu layout, and a community-forward feel.

portfolio.title: Meridian Consulting
portfolio.description: A multi-page professional site with a dark hero, interactive hover effects, and a credibility-focused design for a boutique B2B firm.

portfolio.title: NovaSend — SaaS Product
portfolio.description: A storytelling-focused product page with bold CTAs, animated feature sections, and a modern SaaS aesthetic built to convert.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio Template
portfolio.description: A clean, mobile-first portfolio template with strong visual hierarchy, smooth scroll animations, and easy-to-customise content.

cta.heading: Let's talk about your project.
cta.body: Most projects start with a free 30-minute conversation. Tell me what you need — I'll tell you what's realistic, what it'll cost, and how long it'll take. No pressure.
